title: .env ↔ JSON
description: Bi-directional live conversion between .env and flat JSON: export prefix, single/double-quote escapes, multi-line values, inline comments; nested objects become JSON strings.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Parsing and generation run entirely in your browser — config is never uploaded. The JSON side is a flat string map; nested objects get serialized to JSON strings.

placeholder.env: Paste .env — export / quotes / inline # comments / multi-line values supported
placeholder.json: Paste a flat JSON object, e.g. {"PORT":"8080"}

error.root_must_be_object: JSON root must be an object (not an array or scalar).

hint.flat: Edit either side to auto-sync the other; lock direction for one-way. .env is flat — deep nesting collapses to JSON strings.
